chunks.text: Probes Applet Probes Applet This applet implements the algorithm described in "Dextrous Micromanipulation Based on Two 1 DoF Probes and 3 DoF Translating Stage" . The source code is in Probes.java . Use the pulldown menus to select a different surfac
